FNV PBR PPLIGHTING MATERIAL SEMANTIC STAGE CLOSURE AUDIT

Questions:
1. Which +0xAC..+0xC0 references are real material-object fields versus ESP stack offsets?
2. Which real remaining-array reads choose pass-entry stage keys, resource counts, or only flags?
3. Which helper families receive selector-driver arguments and emit final BA9EE0 rows?
4. Is any normal/height/env/env-mask row proven from material array to final SetTexture stage?

Compatibility rule:
Do not enable visible PBR replacement until material array, pass index, stage key, resource count, and fallback behavior are all proven.
